L1.head: integration of dielectric gradient metamaterials with advanced 3D printing techniques
L1.claim: 材料与技术的整合使新型THz金属透镜开发成为可能

L1.head: development of innovative THz metalenses
L1.tail: overcoming chromatic aberration and diffraction limitations
L1.claim: 新型THz金属透镜可突破传统光学系统的衍射与色差限制

L1.head: overcoming chromatic aberration and diffraction limitations
L1.claim: 突破物理限制后可实现高精度成像应用

L1.head: systematic design of refractive index profile
L1.claim: 通过折射率分布设计利用超材料特性

L1.head: unique properties of metamaterials
L1.claim: 超材料特性实现超越传统系统的成像分辨率

L2.head: dielectric gradient metamaterials
L2.claim: 超材料可被设计为具有定制折射率分布

L2.head: tailored refractive index profiles
L2.claim: 定制折射率分布支持THz波前操控

L2.head: manipulation of THz wavefronts
L2.claim: 波前操控可显著降低色差

L2.head: 3D printing technology
L2.claim: 3D打印实现微结构的精确控制

L2.head: precise control over microstructure
L2.claim: 微结构控制可创建复杂介电梯度剖面

L2.head: complex dielectric gradient profiles
L2.claim: 复杂梯度剖面显著提升超分辨成像性能
